name: I missed work after injury in Ogden—how do I get paid?

mainEntity.name: I missed work after injury in Ogden—how do I get paid?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Temporary total disability pays 66-2/3% of average weekly wage during recovery.** Starts after 3-day wait.[2] Key factors: Doctor release needed; permanent benefits separate. Submit wage docs, attend therapy. Covers lost income until return.
